get.summary: Liveness + Oracle connectivity (read + write DBs)
Readiness probe (read + write DBs)

post.summary: Login (username + password) → access & refresh JWT
Exchange a refresh token for new tokens

get.summary: Current authenticated user + role
List/search items (code ascending, cursor paginated)

post.summary: Create a LOCAL item (MOTECH_POS overlay; POSI2000)

put.summary: Edit an item (local overlay of price/name; POSI2000)

get.summary: Item detail: price + per-warehouse available quantity

Resolve an item by barcode (detail + price + stock). Weighted scale barcodes (prefix 02, 12 digits) are decoded: the embedded item code resolves the item and data.scanned.quantity carries the weight in kg.
All price levels for an item (IAS_ITEM_PRICE): every LEV_NO × unit combination — retail/wholesale/promo lists (POS_ITM_PRICE screen).
Price for a specific price level (sale-time level selection). Optional ?unit= picks the unit; defaults to the base (smallest) unit.
All units of measure for an item (IAS_ITM_DTL) with conversion factors (P_SIZE), per-unit barcode and price — e.g. حبة/كرتون.
Category tree: main item groups (GROUP_DETAILS) with sub-groups (IAS_MAINSUB_GRP_DTL) and item counts. Use ?category= on GET /items.
Item nature types (ITEM_TYPES: stocked/service)
Open shift for a cashier (MOTECH_POS.SHIFTS)
Open shift from YSPOS23 (GET_WRK_SHFT_OPN_FNC, read-only)

post.summary: Open a work shift (selling precondition)
Close a work shift (expected cash + over/short)

get.summary: Cashier reconciliation / Z-report: expected vs actual cash, over/short, per-method breakdown

parameters.name: actualCash
parameters.description: Counted actual cash (for a live X-report over/short); optional

parameters.name: cashExpenses
parameters.description: Cash expenses paid out during the shift

post.summary: Save counted cash by denominations (POST013); sum = actual cash. Replaces a previous count.
Approve the settlement (POST013): expected vs counted denominations → over/short, status SETTLED (irreversible)

get.summary: Final settlement view: expected, counted by denominations, difference, status
Shift summary (X/Z report: sales + cash totals)

post.summary: Create a sale bill (open shift required, idempotent)

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: uuid v7 — mandatory; replays return the same bill (no dup)

get.summary: List bills (newest first, cursor paginated)

post.summary: Add a payment (cash/card/credit/points/coupon; partial/multi-currency) to a posted bill
Settle a bill with MULTIPLE tenders in one call (cash + card + credit, multi-currency)
Hold (park) an in-progress sale (open shift required)

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: uuid — mandatory; replays return the same held bill

get.summary: List held (parked) bills for a cashier

post.summary: Resume a held bill → post it as a real sale

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: uuid — mandatory; idempotency key for the produced POSTED bill

get.summary: Fetch a posted bill from MOTECH_POS (header+lines+payments)
Daily sales summary (count / amount / vat / disc)
Bill detail (header + lines + recomputed totals)
Payment-card types (CREDIT_CARD_TYPES)
Coupon document headers (IAS_CPN_MST)

post.summary: Create a sales return (original bill verified, open shift required, idempotent)

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: uuid v7 — mandatory; replays return the same document (no dup)

get.summary: List returns (newest first, cursor paginated)
Return detail (MOTECH_POS by UUID, or legacy YSPOS23 by RT number)
Daily sales aggregation (count / amount / vat / disc)
Monthly sales aggregation (count / amount / vat / disc)
Best-selling items (Arabic name, qty desc)
Sales per cashier machine (MACHINE_NO)
VAT/tax report by day (taxable base + VAT collected)
Hourly sales distribution (00..23) from BILL_TIME
Top customers by total sales (bill header key)
Discount report by day (header discount vs gross)
Sales grouped by item category (ITEM_TYPES)
Z-report: full end-of-shift/day close (single summary object)
Slow-moving items: least/zero-sold items in the period
Profit per item: revenue vs PRIMARY_COST (item master)
Two-period sales comparison (A vs B) with absolute + % deltas
Full movement history of one item (sales + returns) in a period
Deleted-lines audit trail (IAS_POS_AUD_ITEM; POSR005 domain)
Detailed VAT report grouped by effective rate x item category
Sales per cashier (MOTECH_POS bills+payments; POST012)
Payment-method distribution (MOTECH_POS payments)
Returns aggregation by day (MOTECH_POS returns)
Search customers by Arabic/English name, code or mobile

post.summary: Create a LOCAL customer (MOTECH_POS overlay; POSI010)

put.summary: Edit a customer (local overlay of ERP fields; POSI010)

get.summary: Single customer by C_CODE (ERP + overlay merged)
Loyalty-points balance + movements (IAS_POINT_CALC_TRNS)
Customer's credit (آجل) bills + outstanding debtor balance (POST010/011)

post.summary: Record a collection receipt against a credit bill (POST010/011)

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: uuid — mandatory; replays return the same receipt (no dup)

get.summary: Earned loyalty balance + ledger for a customer (MOTECH_POS)
Full points movement history with running balance per row (POST021)
Chain-wide loyalty totals: granted vs redeemed points (POST021)
Low-stock items (total qty <= threshold, ascending)
Item stock detail (per-warehouse / batch available qty)
List items with aggregated available quantities (Arabic names)
POS cashier machines + status (IAS_POS_MACHINE merged with overlay)

post.summary: Add a cashier machine (LOCAL overlay in MOTECH_POS) — admin only

put.summary: Edit a cashier machine (overlay of ERP/local row) — admin only

get.summary: System users (USER_R merged with local overlay, Arabic names)

post.summary: Create a POS user (LOCAL overlay in MOTECH_POS) — admin only

put.summary: Edit a POS user (overlay of ERP/local row) — admin only
Enable/disable a POS user — admin only

get.summary: Login/logout history (IAS_USR_LGN_HSTRY, most recent first)
Role → action permission matrix (MOTECH_POS.ROLE_PERMISSIONS)

put.summary: Update role permissions (MERGE into ROLE_PERMISSIONS) — admin only

200.description: Envelope { data, meta } with refreshed matrix

post.summary: Create a cash voucher (RECEIPT/قبض or EXPENSE/صرف); open shift required, idempotent

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: uuid v7 — mandatory; replays return the same voucher (no dup)

get.summary: List vouchers (filter by shift, type, cashier, date)
Voucher detail (MOTECH_POS by UUID)
Effective POS settings (live YSPOS23.IAS_PARA_POS merged with local overrides)

put.summary: Upsert POS setting overrides (overlay in MOTECH_POS) — admin only

200.description: Envelope { data, meta } with merged settings

post.summary: Create/upsert POS setting overrides (alias of PUT) — admin only

200.description: Envelope { data, meta } with merged settings

get.summary: Settings for a specific cashier machine (IAS_POS_MACHINE)

post.summary: Generate the e-invoice (TLV/QR + JSON + hash) for a posted bill; simulates SUBMITDOCUMENT

get.summary: Fetch the generated e-invoice document for a bill
Sync queue status (pending/synced/failed counts)
List sync queue entries (optionally by status)

post.summary: Enqueue a bill for sync to the center (idempotent per bill)
Process the pending sync queue (simulated transfer; enforces the -20001 e-invoice guard)

code.description: Item business code (I_CODE) — must be unique

closingBalance.description: Counted closing cash (defaults to expected if omitted)

cashExpenses.description: Cash paid out of the drawer during the shift (reduces expected cash)

currency.description: Currency of the count (defaults to shift currency)

denominations.description: Counted cash by denomination; the sum is the actual cash

cashExpenses.description: Override cash expenses when computing expected cash

amount.description: Tender amount. For POINTS: number of points to redeem. Optional for COUPON (defaults to face value).
Tender amount. For POINTS: number of points to redeem. Optional for COUPON (defaults to face value).

code.description: Customer business code (C_CODE) — must be unique

userId.description: Business user id (U_ID). Omit to auto-assign a local id (>= 9000).

permission.description: Permission code (SALE, RETURN, DISCOUNT, VOID, HOLD, REPORTS, SETTINGS, SHIFT_OPEN, SHIFT_CLOSE, PRICE_OVERRIDE, VOUCHERS, EINVOICE)

allowed.description: true = role may perform the action

cashierNo.description: Cashier number (must have an open shift)

amount.description: Voucher amount (> 0), in the given currency

paymentMethod.description: Tender channel (default CASH). Only CASH affects drawer cash.

key.description: Canonical setting key (e.g. currency, printing.printBill, default.16)

value.description: New value as text; null reverts to the live YSPOS23 value
